title: Debesia minor
intro: Debesia minor, also known as Himalayan pearlwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Debesia minor include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Debesia minor is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create formulations for various health conditions.
